title: Air Traffic Control Awareness and Wildlife Strikes
description: It's a bird! It's a plane! Ever wonder what was the cause of the Miracle on the Hudson? In this dashboard we look at what the effect of a well informed warned pilot vs. a uninformed warned pilot has in helping control damage cost, as well as keeping guests on their planes safe during flight.

Air Traffic Control Awareness and Wildlife Strikes
It's a bird! It's a plane! Ever wonder what was the cause of the Miracle on the Hudson? In this dashboard we look at what the effect of a well informed warned pilot vs. a uninformed warned pilot has in helping control damage cost, as well as keeping guests on their planes safe during flight.
Step Name:Create Logo and Title for Project
Detailed Instructions:

STEP 1: Download the images needed to create this step from the   above. 

STEP 2: Create the Colaberry Logo. Click Insert inside the top toolbar, select image, find the Colaberry logo and select. 

STEP 3: Format size and location of Colaberry Logo. The image displays what should be in the General tab.

STEP 4: Create the Airplane Logo. Click Insert at inside the top toolbar, select image, find the Airplane Logo and select. Format of this will also be done in this step. 

STEP 5: Create the Birds Logo. Click Insert at inside the top toolbar, select image, find the Birds Logo and select. Format of this will also be done in this step. 

STEP 6: Create the Title for our dashboard. Click Insert then text box, select the font size as 24 then center the alignment, next you will format the size and location of the text box, finally format the background. 

All steps are shown in the GIF below.

Insight:

Step Name:Data Modeling Column and Rows
Detailed Instructions:

I do not expect you to do all these, so I have included a Power BI dashboard in the next Step Name that includes all the measures as well. We will be creating measures in the next step. Demonstration of how to change values in Power BI.

Step Name:Creating KPI Cards
Detailed Instructions:

STEP 1: Create the Warned Pilots % KPI. Follow along with the GIF to create.

STEP 2: Create the YOY% Warned Pilot Inc/Dec. Follow along with the GIF to create.

STEP 3: Create the Damage Inidcated %. Follow along with the GIF to create.

STEP 4: Create the YOY% Damage Inc/Dec. Follow along with the GIF for this one.

STEP 5: Create Total Repair Cost. Copy and Paste the Indicated Damage %. 

STEP 6: Create YOY% Repair Cost Inc/Dec. Copy and Paste the YOY% Damage Inc/Dec because it is formatted the same way.

STEP 1: Create the Warned Pilots % KPI. Follow along with the GIF to create.

 

STEP 2: Create the YOY% Warned Pilot Inc/Dec. Follow along with the GIF to create. It will take a bit of time for the color to come in.

 

STEP 3: Create the Damage Inidcated %. Follow along with the GIF to create.

STEP 4: Create the YOY% Damage Inc/Dec. Follow along with the GIF for this one.

STEP 5: Create Total Repair Cost. Copy and Paste the Indicated Damage %. Follow GIF to complete.

STEP 6: Create YOY% Repair Cost Inc/Dec. Copy and Paste the YOY% Damage Inc/Dec because it is formatted the same way.

portfolioContent.title: Air Traffic Control Awareness and Wildlife Strikes
portfolioContent.portfolioSummary: Developed a Power BI dashboard analyzing pilot awareness impact on wildlife strike damage and flight safety.
portfolioContent.summary: This project created a Power BI dashboard to analyze the effect of pilot awareness on wildlife strike incidents in aviation. It compared outcomes between well-informed warned pilots and uninformed pilots to assess damage control and passenger safety. Data modeling and SQL Server were utilized to build a comprehensive data mart for reporting.
portfolioContent.businessProblem: Wildlife strikes pose significant risks to aircraft safety and cause costly damages. There is a need to understand how pilot awareness and warnings influence these incidents. Improving pilot information could reduce damage costs and enhance passenger safety during flights.
objectives: Create a data mart from wildlife strike data using SQL Server
Develop key measures to quantify warned pilot impact
Build an interactive Power BI dashboard for visual insights
workflow: Load wildlife strike data into SQL Server to create a data mart
Import and prepare data in Power BI
Clean and model data, handling null values
Create measures to calculate warned pilot percentages
Design and format dashboard with maps, legends, and logos
keyInsights: Well-informed warned pilots correlate with reduced damage costs from wildlife strikes
Pilot awareness significantly impacts flight safety during wildlife encounters
Geographical variations exist in warned pilot percentages by state
Effective data visualization aids in communicating safety insights to stakeholders
businessImpact: Enhanced decision-making for air traffic control safety protocols
Potential reduction in aircraft damage costs through improved pilot warnings
Increased passenger safety by promoting pilot awareness initiatives
